text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Now, Tamtam, what are you doing here? Is there something you
needed in the right-side room?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oh, y'know, I was just worried how you three were gettin' on.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...That's all? Are you suuure you weren't sneaking over to facilitate a
conversation between Rice and Bourbon?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh?! I mean yeah, but how'd ya...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I knew it. You're such a sweetheart, Tamtam. Whenever
someone needs help, you leap right into action. But...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya wouldn't make a preschooler tally up the family's monthly budget,
would ya? Just let Bourbon focus on her strengths.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ah, don't sweat it! I'll fix it up later, so leave it there for me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...Have you tried waiting for them?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Waiting?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
For them to figure things out themselves. I'm not telling you to stop
helping, but you shouldn't do everything for them.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Just give them a little hint... and then wait. They might not get it on
the first try, but that's part of learning.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You have to believe in them—that's what caretaking is all about.

text_block_list.name: Rob Roy & Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Tamamo. Can I come after all?
Creek, we solved the mystery. Can you please gather everyone?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...Because they can do it if they try.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Whew, we managed to make it out.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Um, Rice? Did you and Bourbon... g-get a chance to talk? While you
were in... the other room...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? I guess we spoke a little. Kind of. We honestly just, um...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rattle.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Aaah!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Your reactions are very pronounced. This is good reference material
for tricks that will scare guests.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh... I-is it really?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Bourbon worked out the riddle herself. I was too scared to
do much.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But that's okay. All I ever do is get in the way, so I'm really happy she
called me a good reference.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
And that's all thanks to you inviting us to visit the park with you.
Hehe... Thank you. I really appreciate everything you've done, Rob
Roy.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: That's a relief... I'm just glad I could be of help!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Rob Roy?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
To be honest... I was so worried that I'd dragged you both here and
marched you around the park without considering your feelings.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...I, I had no idea. If anything, you seemed extra confident today.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: You can thank Sweep for that. She lent me a wand.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
It lets me speak my mind like Sweep does. Almost like... the magic
has transformed me into a real witch.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Transformed you?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Halloween is a day to dress up and dare to be someone else. You can
borrow the costume's power to say things you can't say yourself.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Does that mean... deep down, you were nervous too? And all this
time, you've been hiding it?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I was, but you seemed so down. I had to do something, even
if it was forward of me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Rice, Rob Roy. We're heading to the next area.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: We'll be right there! And, Rice, um... I also wanted to say...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You keep saying you're in the way, but to me, your presence is always
warm and supporting. I've been really wanting... to tell you that.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Rob Roy...
